# Roster defaults — managed by `roster init`; do not edit between markers

# Secrets and credentials
.env
.env.local
/.env
**/.env
*.pem
*.key

# Editor / OS
.DS_Store
.idea/
.vscode/
*.swp
*~

# Node
node_modules/

# Operation logs and run/feedback bodies — preserve directories with .gitkeep
*/log/runs/2*/
*/log/feedback/2*/

# Machine-local operations ledger state (`roster ops setup`)
/.roster/ops/

# Temp / scratch
**/scratch/
**/tmp/
**/.cache/

# End Roster defaults
